name: Danny Glover
abstract: Daniel Leburn Glover ( GLUV-ər; born July 22, 1946) is an American actor, producer, and political activist. Over his career he has received numerous accolades including the Jean Hersholt Humanitarian Award from the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences, the NAACP's President's Award, as well as nominations for five Emmy Awards and …

about_quotes.speaker: Wendy Oxenhorn
about_quotes.evidence: Danny Glover told me there were 2 million people who were taken from Africa... I call him Martin Luther, Junior, Jr. He’s unbelievable.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wendy Oxenhorn — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Onaje Allan Gumbs
about_quotes.evidence: I did a film for Danny Glover in ’94 for Showtime, so that experience was something that has opened me up also.
about_quotes.doc_title: Onaje Allan Gumbs interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 12, 2001
